stemHtml: The Quick Turnaround Limit Weight (QTLW) is the maximum landing weight for which…

options.a: the landing gear structure will resist between two successive landings.
options.b: there is no minimum ground time required, with respect to possible fuse plug melting, before executing a subsequent takeoff.
options.c: there is no more guarantee for sufficient brake energy absorption in case of a long landing.
options.d: there is no more guarantee for sufficient brake energy absorption in case of a short landing.
